'''podataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivylike|ivylike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivylike|ivylike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| podataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || podatithi || podatiji || podatishi || podatiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || podatuthu || podatuju || podatushu || podatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || podatuthu || podatuju || podatushu || podatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || podatufthuf || podatufjuf || podatufshuf || podatufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || podatethe || podateje || podateshe || podateke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || podatotho || podatojo || podatosho || podatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || podatotho || podatojo || podatosho || podatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || podatofthof || podatofjof || podatofshof || podatofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || podatïfthïf || podatïfjïf || podatïfshïf || podatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || podatïfthïf || podatïfjïf || podatïfshïf || podatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || podatïfthïf || podatïfjïf || podatïfshïf || podatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || podatïfthïf || podatïfjïf || podatïfshïf || podatïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || podatæthæ || podatæjæ || podatæshæ || podatækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || podatatha || podataja || podatasha || podataka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || podatatha || podataja || podatasha || podataka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || podatafthaf || podatafjaf || podatafshaf || podatafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || podatasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || podatshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || podatroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || podatmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || podatyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopodatnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopodatnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopodatnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopodatnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || podadatasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || podadatshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || podadatroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || podadatmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || podadatyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopodadatnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopodadatnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopodadatnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopodadatnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || pedætasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || pedætshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || pedætroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || pedætmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || pedætyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopedætnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopedætnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopedætnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopedætnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || podfatasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || podfatshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || podfatroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || podfatmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || podfatyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopodfatnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopodfatnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopodfatnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopodfatnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
